title: 10 Levels of AI Mastery: From ChatGPT to Ikigai | Learn By Doing #1
description:
Most people use AI to ask questions. That's Level 1. There are 9 more levels — and the highest has nothing to do with technology.

In this first live stream of Learn By Doing Academy, I break down the 10 levels of AI mastery using a corporate hierarchy analogy, explain how AI agents work (system prompts, model choice, skills, tools, and recursion), dive into Ikigai philosophy, and demo the Web100 project — building websites for local businesses with autonomous AI agents.

Chapters:
0:00 Pre-stream
6:41 Welcome & setup
9:56 What's your Instagram bubble?
12:54 Three groups of AI users
14:44 Level 2: Operators — giving AI tasks
17:10 Level 3: Manager — delegating projects
20:54 Interactive: What role is above manager?
25:58 Levels 4-5: Division Manager & VP
31:37 Levels 6-8: CEO, Board, Investor
36:53 Level 9: Ikigai — finding your mission
41:20 Heart vs Head — psychology of purpose
45:39 Philosophy, religion & what drives us
51:48 Duality: creation and destruction
55:56 Level 10: The Quasi World — source of ideas
1:02:44 Back to practical: agent orchestration
1:08:01 What is an AI agent? (4 components)
1:09:45 Recursion: agents running agents
1:10:35 Why CS50 is essential
1:11:12 The Ikigai Team vision — autopilot organizations
1:13:31 Project showcase: aloshai, Mystery Games, 15x4 Munich
1:16:19 Web100: 100 websites for 100 neighbors
1:18:20 Sales pitch deck walkthrough
1:22:05 Before vs after: Thai massage salon
1:24:12 Cold outreach & cultural considerations
1:31:42 Julia McCoy's AI avatar & resources
1:34:01 Learn By Doing Academy — what's included
1:35:20 Pricing: Community, Live, Mentorship
1:37:03 Feedback & next steps
